title: Carson
description: 3x15 min @ 88-92% with 15s threshold kicks every 5 min

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 92% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 92%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/15. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/15. 5:00 at 92%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 88-92%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 13 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 15s at 105%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 105% for 15s. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 15 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/15. 4:45 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 92% FTP, Seated. 4:45. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:45 at 92%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/15. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19% into session. 92%, 88-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 25% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/3. 25% complete. Hold 105% steady. 59 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 105% for 0:15. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/15. 4:45 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 92% FTP, Seated. 4:45. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 92%, 88-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/15. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/15. 92% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/15. 5:00 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 37% complete. Rep 6/15. 92% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 6/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 9 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 6/15. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% complete. Rep 6/15. 92% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 43% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 44 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 35 minutes in. 105% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 43% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 8 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 43% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 92%, 82-90 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 92% for 4:45. Then 0:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 92% for 4:45. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8/15. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 88-92%, Cadence: 82-90 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 39 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 40 minutes in. 105% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 50% done. 5 intervals left. 35 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 92% for 4:45. Then 5:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of work done. 35 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 4:45. Then 35min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 10. 5 to go. 35 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 11/15. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 11. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% done. 4 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 11/15. 92% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% through. 105% at 75-85 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 68% complete. Hold 105% steady. 24 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 3 blocks to go. 24 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 68% complete. 105% for 15s. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 13/15. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% complete. Rep 13/15. 92% at 75-85 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 13/15. 55 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 13. 2 to go. 20 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 3/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 1 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 40min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 19 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 92% for 4:45. Then 15min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 92% × 4:45. Then 15min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:45 at 92%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 4:45. Then 15min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 92% × 4:45. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65 minutes of work done. 10 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 70 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
